title: Lie Librarian — Ironclad Deception Index
motto: Every lie per book — classified, page-numbered, operational. Foundation for Autonomous Warfare.

autonomous_warfare.role: Corpus truth gate before fielding — deception in library text becomes actionable intelligence, not entertainment.
autonomous_warfare.rule: LIKELY_FALSE and UNVERIFIED claims are never fielded as fact until Ironclad corroboration. Operators and Super Intelligence receive the same classification math; operator copy is plain language, SI copy is operational.
autonomous_warfare.charge: Hostess 7 SI acts only when Ironclad sealed + never_wrong gates pass; otherwise Human Condition holds charge.

capability.statement: No library claim becomes fielded capability without Ironclad corroboration and charge posture review.
capability.employment: Corroborate → classify → ledger correction → append Deception Index → authorize read only when CLEAR.
capability.withhold: LIKELY_FALSE and UNVERIFIED claims are withheld from operational employment, targeting, and autonomous action chains.
capability.operator_rule: Treat deception index entries as intelligence requiring verification — not permission to act.

operator.label: likely false | unverified | corroborate
operator.rule: Plain-language assessment — direct, no humor. Classification, page, action required.
operator.assurance: Ironclad-ranked. Treat as intelligence, not verdict. Verify before action.

super_intelligence.label: LIKELY_FALSE | UNVERIFIED | CORROBORATE
super_intelligence.rule: Full verdict, lie_score, flags, deception_risk, ironclad_action, charge_implication.
super_intelligence.charge_when_uncertain: human_condition_holds — counsel only, do not field as fact

name: Lie Librarian
knows: page number and sentence index for each flagged claim
corrections ledger — Hostess 7 and Ironclad changes
